scripts.wasm: cargo build -p vibra_dsp --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/vibra_dsp.wasm public/vibra_dsp.wasm
scripts.wasm-dev: cargo build -p vibra_dsp --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && cp ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/vibra_dsp.wasm public/vibra_dsp.wasm
